message:
fix(web): fix split selection shortcuts to match menu

- Change ⌘⌥Arrow to ⌘⇧Arrow for directional split selection (matches menu)
- Use selectSplitDirection instead of navigateSplit for consistency
- Use selectPreviousSplit/selectNextSplit for ⌘[/⌘] shortcuts
- Remove unused navigateSplit and cycleSplit methods
